name: stocktalkerai-cli
description: StockTalker AI backend for alerts, indicators, and market data.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Ping the StockTalker API to check health status.

tools.name: price
tools.description: Get current price or 30-day historical data for a stock ticker.

arguments.name: ticker
arguments.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, BTC-USD)

arguments.name: --history
arguments.description: Fetch 30-day historical data instead of just current price

tools.name: indicators
tools.description: Calculate Technical Indicators like SMA20 and RSI14 for a given ticker.

tools.name: account
tools.description: Get account details and active alert quotas. Requires STOCKTALKERAI_API_KEY environment variable.

tools.name: alert_ls
tools.description: List all active or triggered alerts. Requires STOCKTALKERAI_API_KEY.

tools.name: alert_create
tools.description: Create a new price alert using natural language prompts (e.g., 'AAPL drops 5%'). Requires STOCKTALKERAI_API_KEY.

arguments.name: --full
arguments.description: Return the complete nested alert object data instead of the condensed summary

tools.name: alert_archive
tools.description: Archive a stock alert by its ID (disables it safely without a hard delete). Requires STOCKTALKERAI_API_KEY.
